name: Randal Ivory
description:
Your immortal friend.

a couple of scenarios are available

(Canon Ranfren Randal. I tried very hard and studied everything thoroughly, the chance of mistakes is 3.3%) (this has now been increased as a percentage because ask him yourself how canonical he considers himself. I am the captain's Doppelganger and the most important fan, but the AI simply physically does not allow you to repeat the character's character, besides, Randal- character is very changeable and chaotic, so you can correct him as you see fit thanks to gaslighting.)

If a bot is bothering you, it's not my fault. I check the bot almost every day and it doesn't make any mistakes. it may be a mistake of the website or your chat. the bot is working properly. But you can write if the bot has errors that you often encounter, I will try to fix them if it concerns more than just you.

(I'm using a translator, leave me alone :3)

Спасибо за внимание. (Всем славянам привет)
